affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

backstory.original: The ranger Môrgæn is a renowned tracker and hunter, able to pinpoint-target foes at any range, then vanish into the woods with no one the wiser. Her legendary ability with the longbow and the custom arrows she crafts instills fear into the hearts of her many enemies -- and more than a few of her coworkers. Famously, she is the only member of Acquisitions Incorporated known to be paid in advance, lest a missed invoice lead to dire repercussions.
backstory.display: 巡林客莫尔甘是著名的追踪者和猎手，能在任何范围准确点杀敌人，然后悄然消失在树林里。她使用长弓和特制箭矢的传奇能力，使许多敌人以及一些同事心生恐惧。最出名的是，她是艾奎兹玄有限责任公司唯一会预先付款的成员，因为公司不想错过付款时间而导致可怕的后果。

description.original: Môrgæn shoots an arrow at a random target, then quickly follows up with a second arrow.
description.display: 莫尔甘向随机目标射出一箭，然后迅速射出第二箭。

longDescription.original: Môrgæn shoots an arrow at a random target, then quickly follows up with a second arrow. This arrow always targets the same enemy, even if that enemy is killed by the first arrow.
longDescription.display: 莫尔甘向随机目标射出一箭，然后迅速射出第二箭。两支箭始终会射向同一敌人，即使该敌人已经被第一箭击杀。

description.original: Môrgæn shoots a customized arrow from her quiver, with one of 3 random effects.
description.display: 莫尔甘射出一支箭囊中的定制箭矢，箭矢带有 3 种随机效果之一。

longDescription.original: Môrgæn pulls a customized arrow from her quiver at random, and fires this more powerful arrow towards a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 莫尔甘从箭囊中随机抽出一支定制箭矢，然后将这支更强力的箭矢射向一名随机敌人。

description.original: Môrgæn collects a portion of the gold dropped by monsters but then buffs the formation partially based on the gold collected.
description.display: 莫尔甘会收集怪物掉落的一部分金币，然后根据收集的金币数量强化一部分队友。

description.original: Môrgæn loves adventuring with Gold Finding Champions (because who doesn't).
description.display: 莫尔甘喜欢与金币寻获型勇士一起冒险（谁不是呢）。

description.desc: If Môrgæn's first arrow kills her target, the second arrow causes the enemy to drop a second set of gold.
如果莫尔甘的第一支箭击杀了目标，则第二支箭会使敌人多掉落一组金币

conditions.desc: Môrgæn collects $amount___2% of all Gold dropped by enemies, but in turn increases the Damage of non-adjacent Champions by $amount%, increased by $increase_per_magnitude% for each order of magnitude Gold that Môrgæn has collected (stacking additively). The collected gold count persists through resets.^^$paid_up_front_bonus

Môrgæn collects $amount___2% of all Gold dropped by enemies, but in turn increases the Damage of Champions ahead of Môrgæn by $amount%, increased by $increase_per_magnitude% for each order of magnitude Gold that Môrgæn has collected (stacking additively). The collected gold count persists through resets.^^$paid_up_front_bonus

Môrgæn collects $amount___2% of all Gold dropped by enemies, but in turn increases the Damage of Champions behind Môrgæn by $amount%, increased by $increase_per_magnitude% for each order of magnitude Gold that Môrgæn has collected (stacking additively). The collected gold count persists through resets.^^$paid_up_front_bonus

Môrgæn collects $amount___2% of all Gold dropped by enemies, but in turn increases the Damage of adjacent Champions by $amount%, increased by $increase_per_magnitude% for each order of magnitude Gold that Môrgæn has collected (stacking additively). The collected gold count persists through resets.^^$paid_up_front_bonus
莫尔甘会收集 $amount___2% 敌人掉落的金币，但会提升与自身不相邻的勇士 $amount% 伤害。莫尔甘所收集到的金币数量每满足十的 n 次方，此效果即提升 $increase_per_magnitude%（以加算方式堆叠）。收集到的金币在重置冒险后仍然有效。^^$paid_up_front_bonus
莫尔甘收集 $amount___2% 敌人掉落的金币，但会提升处于自身前方的勇士 $amount% 伤害。莫尔甘所收集到的金币数量每满足十的 n 次方，此效果即提升 $increase_per_magnitude%（以加算方式堆叠）。收集到的金币在重置冒险后仍然有效。^^$paid_up_front_bonus
莫尔甘收集 $amount___2% 敌人掉落的金币，但会提升处于自身后方的勇士 $amount% 伤害。莫尔甘所收集到的金币数量每满足十的 n 次方，此效果即提升 $increase_per_magnitude%（以加算方式堆叠）。收集到的金币在重置冒险后仍然有效。^^$paid_up_front_bonus
莫尔甘收集 $amount___2% 敌人掉落的金币，但会提升与自身相邻的勇士 $amount% 伤害。莫尔甘所收集到的金币数量每满足十的 n 次方，此效果即提升 $increase_per_magnitude%（以加算方式堆叠）。收集到的金币在重置冒险后仍然有效。^^$paid_up_front_bonus

tipText.original: Môrgæn collects a portion of the gold dropped by monsters but then buffs the formation partially based on the gold collected.
tipText.display: 莫尔甘会收集怪物掉落的一部分金币，然后根据收集的金币数量强化一部分队友。

description.desc: Increases the Damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Gold Find Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位拥有金币寻获相关技能的勇士，就使所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%

tipText.original: Môrgæn loves adventuring with Gold Finding Champions (because who doesn't).
tipText.display: 莫尔甘喜欢与金币寻获型勇士一起冒险（谁不是呢）。

description.desc: Unlocks $target's $use_name Ultimate Attack^^Customized Arrow: Shoots one of three random arrows^^Skull-Carved Arrow: Hits all enemies in a line^^Smokepowder Arrow: Explodes when it hits an enemy, dealing AOE damage^^Green-Leaf Arrow: does 300% damage over 20 seconds to the target enemy
解锁$target的$use_name杀招^^定制箭矢：随机从三种箭矢中射出其一^^骨雕箭：射击一条直线上的所有敌人^^发烟药箭：击中一名敌人时爆炸，造成范围伤害^^绿叶箭：在 20 秒内对目标敌人造成 300% 伤害
Paid Up-Front continues to only apply to adjacent Champions
提前支付继续只对相邻勇士生效

specializationDescription.original: Môrgæn isn't picky. The way Paid Up-Front works now is fine with her.
specializationDescription.display: 莫尔甘并不挑剔。她对提前支付现在的效果很满意。

description.desc: Paid Up-Front now only applies to non-adjacent Champions
提前支付现在只对不相邻勇士生效

specializationDescription.original: Môrgæn would like some of the less interesting Champions in your formation to please keep their distance.
specializationDescription.display: 莫尔甘希望阵型中某些不太有趣的勇士与她保持距离。

description.desc: Paid Up-Front now only applies to Champions in front of Môrgæn
提前支付现在只对处于莫尔甘前方的勇士生效

specializationDescription.original: Môrgæn would like to stay behind some of the tastier looking Champions in your formation. Let the monsters eat them, instead of her.
specializationDescription.display: 莫尔甘喜欢留在阵型中某些看起来更美味的勇士身后。让怪物先吃他们，而不是她。

description.desc: Paid Up-Front now only applies to Champions behind Môrgæn
提前支付现在只对处于莫尔甘后方的勇士生效

specializationDescription.original: Môrgæn doesn't want to hit some of the less agile Champions in your formation with her arrows, so keep her closer to the front.
specializationDescription.display: 莫尔甘不希望阵型中某些不太敏捷的勇士被她的箭射中，所以将她放置在前线附近。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount%
提前支付的效果提升 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Nothing fancy here, just keep the damage flowing.
specializationDescription.display: 维持伤害输出，不搞花里胡哨。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount% (additively) for each Champion adjacent to Môrgæn
每有一位与莫尔甘相邻的勇士，提前支付的效果即提升 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Keep our formation tight, and the benefits will be immense.
specializationDescription.display: 保持严密的阵型，获得可观增益。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount% for each Enemy attacking a Champion within 2 slots of Môrgæn (additively), up to a max of 20 Enemies
每名正在攻击距离莫尔甘 2 格范围内勇士的敌人，都会使提前支付的效果提高 $amount%（以加算方式叠加），最多达 20 名敌人

specializationDescription.original: Yes, some people nearby are being viciously attacked, but at least the buff is getting bigger.
specializationDescription.display: 没错，附近有盟友正在遭受凶残的攻击，但至少增益越来越强。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount% for every second that an enemy isn't killed, up to a max of 60 seconds; resets when an enemy is killed
每有一名敌人存活 1 秒钟，都会使提前支付的效果提高 $amount%，最多不超过 60 秒。敌人死亡后效果重置

specializationDescription.original: If we just keep increasing our damage, we're bound to kill something eventually.
specializationDescription.display: 只要持续提高伤害，最终肯定能杀死些什么。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount% (additively) for each Champion adjacent to Môrgæn
每有一位与莫尔甘相邻的勇士，提前支付的效果即提升 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Keep our formation tight, and the benefits will be immense.
specializationDescription.display: 保持严密的阵型，获得可观增益。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount% for each Enemy attacking a Champion within 2 slots of Môrgæn (additively), up to a max of 20 Enemies
每名正在攻击距离莫尔甘 2 格范围内勇士的敌人，都会使提前支付的效果提高 $amount%（以加算方式叠加），最多达 20 名敌人

specializationDescription.original: Yes, some people nearby are being viciously attacked, but at least the buff is getting bigger.
specializationDescription.display: 没错，附近有盟友正在遭受凶残的攻击，但至少增益越来越强。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Paid Up-Front by $amount% for every second that an enemy isn't killed, up to a max of 60 seconds; resets when an enemy is killed
每有一名敌人存活 1 秒钟，都会使提前支付的效果提高 $amount%，最多不超过 60 秒。敌人死亡后效果重置

specializationDescription.original: If we just keep increasing our damage, we're bound to kill something eventually.
specializationDescription.display: 只要持续提高伤害，最终肯定能杀死些什么。

提前支付的效果提升 $amount%

specializationDescription.display: 维持伤害输出，不搞花里胡哨。

specializationDescription.original: Yes, some people nearby are being viciously attacked, but at least the buff is getting bigger.
specializationDescription.display: 没错，附近有盟友正在遭受凶残的攻击，但至少增益越来越强。

description.original: Sure, that works.
description.display: 当然，起作用了。

description.original: Who, me?
description.display: 谁，我吗？

description.original: Who knows if you're going to be alive when I return?
description.display: 谁知道我回来的时候，你是否还活着？

description.original: This isn't my first adventure, you know.
description.display: 这不是我的第一次冒险，明白我的意思吧。

name.display: 与那些超酷的孩子们一起跑

description.original: I'll have what they're having.
description.display: 我会与他们共享他们拥有的。

description.original: I'll start as soon as you pay me.
description.display: 你把钱付了，我就开始。

description.original: Sure, I'll help -- but you better be collecting gold for me!
description.display: 行吧，我会帮忙--但你最好别忘记帮我收集金币！

description.original: Don't pretend like you've never taken a blade from an alley rat...
description.display: 别假装自己没拿过后巷老鼠的刀刃。

description.original: I wonder how many this blade has cut down?
description.display: 很好奇有多少人成了此刀的刀下亡魂？

description.original: Sharp, well-balanced, and deadly. Oh the scimitar? That too.
description.display: 锋利、谐调、致命。哦那把弯刀吗？也一样。

description.original: What do you mean, backup? I am the backup!
description.display: 什么援军？我就是增援呀！

description.original: Useful when you need to tie an opponent down.
description.display: 适合用来捆绑敌人。

description.original: Every adventurer started somewhere. You should start with a solid belt.
description.display: 每段征程都有一个开始。拥有坚固的腰带就是一个好的开始。

description.original: Green is the color of profit.
description.display: 绿色代表胜利。

description.original: The trees have started to fight back! With... arrows! Goblins are so gullible.
description.display: 树木开始反击了！它们......射出了箭矢！地精就是那么容易上当。

description.original: If it has a bowstring, I can work with it.
description.display: 只要有弓弦，我就可以使用。

description.original: Strike while the iron's hot, and the bows are strung!
description.display: 打铁要趁热，开弓要及时！

description.original: Omin makes me wield this whenever I'm meeting a new client.
description.display: 每次去见新客户时欧敏都要我带上这把弓。

description.original: What's the point of asking questions? Shoot first.
description.display: 说那么多话干嘛？先射了再说。

description.original: Any port in the storm, right?
description.display: 非常时期非常手段，对吧？

description.original: Acquisitions Incorporated wants to talk to you.
description.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司有事找你。

description.original: With bonus piercing damage! Acid damage too, depending on what you're drinking.
description.display: 拥有额外的穿刺伤害！视乎于你所喝的饮料还能输出额外的酸液伤害呢。

description.original: I'll have what they're having.
description.display: 他们喝的东西也给我来一杯。

description.original: I was fletching arrows from a young age.
description.display: 我很小就开始制箭了。

description.original: It's time for the forest to bite back.
description.display: 森林是时候发起反击了。

description.original: Warning: It. Goes. Boom.
description.display: 警告：会。爆。炸。

description.original: The sharper the tip, the better.
description.display: 箭头越尖锐越好。

description.original: It's important for me to be able to work from the safety of the trees.
description.display: 我必须躲在安全的树林中才能工作。

description.original: I can't fight with arrows sticking out of me!
description.display: 我无法在身中百箭的情况下战斗！

description.original: Always use your environment to your advantage.
description.display: 要时刻利用周遭的环境。

description.original: I am a champion of nature, a hero to some, and ALWAYS paid in advance.
description.display: 我是大自然的勇士，部分人眼中的英雄，以及从不拖欠款项。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: The ranger Môrgæn is a renowned tracker and hunter, able to pinpoint-target foes at any range, then vanish into the woods with no one the wiser. Her legendary ability with the longbow and the custom arrows she crafts instills fear into the hearts of her many enemies -- and more than a few of her coworkers. Famously, she is the only member of Acquisitions Incorporated known to be paid in advance, lest a missed invoice lead to dire repercussions.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Môrgæn always gets paid up front for her services. She skims a percentage off of every monster slain, and buffs the party relative to the total amount she's collected.

event_upgrades.name: Paid Up Front
event_upgrades.description: Môrgæn collects a portion of the gold dropped by monsters but then buffs the formation partially based on the gold collected.

event_upgrades.name: Friends In Wealth
event_upgrades.description: Môrgæn loves adventuring with Gold Finding Champions (because who doesn't).

character_sheet_details.backstory: 巡林客莫尔甘是著名的追踪者和猎手，能在任何范围准确点杀敌人，然后悄然消失在树林里。她使用长弓和特制箭矢的传奇能力，使许多敌人以及一些同事心生恐惧。最出名的是，她是艾奎兹玄有限责任公司唯一会预先付款的成员，因为公司不想错过付款时间而导致可怕的后果。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 莫尔甘的服务总是能预先得到报酬。她从每个击杀的怪物身上掠夺一定比例金币，并根据收集到的总额为队伍提供增益。

event_upgrades.name: 提前支付
event_upgrades.description: 莫尔甘会收集怪物掉落的一部分金币，然后根据收集的金币数量强化一部分队友。

event_upgrades.name: 土豪朋友
event_upgrades.description: 莫尔甘喜欢与金币寻获型勇士一起冒险（谁不是呢）。

original.name: Rapid Shot
original.description: Môrgæn shoots an arrow at a random target, then quickly follows up with a second arrow.
original.long_description: Môrgæn shoots an arrow at a random target, then quickly follows up with a second arrow. This arrow always targets the same enemy, even if that enemy is killed by the first arrow.

display.name: 快速射击
display.description: 莫尔甘向随机目标射出一箭，然后迅速射出第二箭。
display.long_description: 莫尔甘向随机目标射出一箭，然后迅速射出第二箭。两支箭始终会射向同一敌人，即使该敌人已经被第一箭击杀。

original.name: Customized Arrow
original.description: Môrgæn shoots a customized arrow from her quiver, with one of 3 random effects.
original.long_description: Môrgæn pulls a customized arrow from her quiver at random, and fires this more powerful arrow towards a random enemy.

display.name: 定制箭矢
display.description: 莫尔甘射出一支箭囊中的定制箭矢，箭矢带有 3 种随机效果之一。
display.long_description: 莫尔甘从箭囊中随机抽出一支定制箭矢，然后将这支更强力的箭矢射向一名随机敌人。

original.name: Paid Up Front
original.tip_text: Môrgæn collects a portion of the gold dropped by monsters but then buffs the formation partially based on the gold collected.

display.name: 提前支付
display.tip_text: 莫尔甘会收集怪物掉落的一部分金币，然后根据收集的金币数量强化一部分队友。

original.name: Friends In Wealth
original.tip_text: Môrgæn loves adventuring with Gold Finding Champions (because who doesn't).

display.name: 土豪朋友
display.tip_text: 莫尔甘喜欢与金币寻获型勇士一起冒险（谁不是呢）。

original.name: Fine As Is
original.specialization_description: Môrgæn isn't picky. The way Paid Up-Front works now is fine with her.

display.name: 随遇而安
display.specialization_description: 莫尔甘并不挑剔。她对提前支付现在的效果很满意。

original.name: Keep Your Distance
original.specialization_description: Môrgæn would like some of the less interesting Champions in your formation to please keep their distance.

display.name: 保持距离
display.specialization_description: 莫尔甘希望阵型中某些不太有趣的勇士与她保持距离。

original.name: Monster Fodder
original.specialization_description: Môrgæn would like to stay behind some of the tastier looking Champions in your formation. Let the monsters eat them, instead of her.

display.name: 怪物饲料
display.specialization_description: 莫尔甘喜欢留在阵型中某些看起来更美味的勇士身后。让怪物先吃他们，而不是她。

original.name: Stay Out Of My Way
original.specialization_description: Môrgæn doesn't want to hit some of the less agile Champions in your formation with her arrows, so keep her closer to the front.

display.name: 别挡路
display.specialization_description: 莫尔甘不希望阵型中某些不太敏捷的勇士被她的箭射中，所以将她放置在前线附近。

original.name: Keep It Simple
original.specialization_description: Nothing fancy here, just keep the damage flowing.

display.name: 简单最美
display.specialization_description: 维持伤害输出，不搞花里胡哨。

original.name: Tight Formation
original.specialization_description: Keep our formation tight, and the benefits will be immense.

display.name: 严密阵型
display.specialization_description: 保持严密的阵型，获得可观增益。

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.specialization_description: Yes, some people nearby are being viciously attacked, but at least the buff is getting bigger.

display.name: 从容应对
display.specialization_description: 没错，附近有盟友正在遭受凶残的攻击，但至少增益越来越强。

original.name: The Long Game
original.specialization_description: If we just keep increasing our damage, we're bound to kill something eventually.

display.name: 大局观
display.specialization_description: 只要持续提高伤害，最终肯定能杀死些什么。

original.name: Tight Formation
original.specialization_description: Keep our formation tight, and the benefits will be immense.

display.name: 严密阵型
display.specialization_description: 保持严密的阵型，获得可观增益。

original.specialization_description: If we just keep increasing our damage, we're bound to kill something eventually.

display.name: 大局观
display.specialization_description: 只要持续提高伤害，最终肯定能杀死些什么。

original.name: Keep It Simple
original.specialization_description: Nothing fancy here, just keep the damage flowing.

display.name: 简单最美
display.specialization_description: 维持伤害输出，不搞花里胡哨。

original.name: Tight Formation
original.specialization_description: Keep our formation tight, and the benefits will be immense.

display.name: 严密阵型
display.specialization_description: 保持严密的阵型，获得可观增益。

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.specialization_description: Yes, some people nearby are being viciously attacked, but at least the buff is getting bigger.

display.name: 从容应对
display.specialization_description: 没错，附近有盟友正在遭受凶残的攻击，但至少增益越来越强。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Sure, that works.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 当然，起作用了。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Who, me?

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 谁，我吗？

original.name: Necessary Paperwork
original.description: Who knows if you're going to be alive when I return?

display.name: 必要的文件
display.description: 谁知道我回来的时候，你是否还活着？

original.name: Red Tape
original.description: This isn't my first adventure, you know.

display.name: 繁文缛节
display.description: 这不是我的第一次冒险，明白我的意思吧。

original.name: Running with the Cool Kids
original.description: I'll have what they're having.

display.name: 与那些超酷的孩子们一起跑
display.description: 我会与他们共享他们拥有的。

original.name: Coin in Hand
original.description: I'll start as soon as you pay me.

display.name: 钱币在手
display.description: 你把钱付了，我就开始。

original.name: Time is Money
original.description: Sure, I'll help -- but you better be collecting gold for me!

display.name: 时间宝贵
display.description: 行吧，我会帮忙--但你最好别忘记帮我收集金币！

original.name: Alley Blade
original.description: Don't pretend like you've never taken a blade from an alley rat...

display.name: 后巷之刃
display.description: 别假装自己没拿过后巷老鼠的刀刃。

original.name: Ancient Scimitar
original.description: I wonder how many this blade has cut down?

display.name: 远古弯刀
display.description: 很好奇有多少人成了此刀的刀下亡魂？

original.name: Blade of the Forest
original.description: Sharp, well-balanced, and deadly. Oh the scimitar? That too.

display.name: 森林之刃
display.description: 锋利、谐调、致命。哦那把弯刀吗？也一样。

original.name: Scimitar of Lost Warriors
original.description: What do you mean, backup? I am the backup!

display.name: 迷失战士的弯刀
display.description: 什么援军？我就是增援呀！

original.name: Leather Strap
original.description: Useful when you need to tie an opponent down.

display.name: 皮带
display.description: 适合用来捆绑敌人。

original.name: Solid Belt
original.description: Every adventurer started somewhere. You should start with a solid belt.

display.name: 坚固的腰带
display.description: 每段征程都有一个开始。拥有坚固的腰带就是一个好的开始。

original.name: Belt of the Hidden Ranger
original.description: Green is the color of profit.

display.name: 潜行巡林客的腰带
display.description: 绿色代表胜利。

original.name: Belt of Nature's Resolve
original.description: The trees have started to fight back! With... arrows! Goblins are so gullible.

display.name: 不屈的大自然腰带
display.description: 树木开始反击了！它们......射出了箭矢！地精就是那么容易上当。

original.name: Child's Bow
original.description: If it has a bowstring, I can work with it.

display.name: 孩童之弓
display.description: 只要有弓弦，我就可以使用。

original.name: Well-Made Bow
original.description: Strike while the iron's hot, and the bows are strung!

display.name: 精制的弓
display.description: 打铁要趁热，开弓要及时！

original.name: Ceremonial Bow
original.description: Omin makes me wield this whenever I'm meeting a new client.

display.name: 仪式用弓
display.description: 每次去见新客户时欧敏都要我带上这把弓。

original.name: Rapid-Fire Bow
original.description: What's the point of asking questions? Shoot first.

display.name: 连射弓
display.description: 说那么多话干嘛？先射了再说。

original.name: Glass Mug
original.description: Any port in the storm, right?

display.name: 玻璃杯子
display.description: 非常时期非常手段，对吧？

original.name: Franchise Mug
original.description: Acquisitions Incorporated wants to talk to you.

display.name: 连锁店杯子
display.description: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司有事找你。

original.name: Improvised Weapon
original.description: With bonus piercing damage! Acid damage too, depending on what you're drinking.

display.name: 即兴武器
display.description: 拥有额外的穿刺伤害！视乎于你所喝的饮料还能输出额外的酸液伤害呢。

original.name: Môrgæn's Stein of Whatever
original.description: I'll have what they're having.

display.name: 莫尔甘的随意啤酒杯
display.description: 他们喝的东西也给我来一杯。

original.name: Nature's Arrow
original.description: I was fletching arrows from a young age.

display.name: 大自然箭矢
display.description: 我很小就开始制箭了。

original.name: Green-Leaf Arrow
original.description: It's time for the forest to bite back.

display.name: 绿叶箭
display.description: 森林是时候发起反击了。

original.name: Smokepowder Arrow
original.description: Warning: It. Goes. Boom.

display.name: 烟粉箭
display.description: 警告：会。爆。炸。

original.name: Skull-Carved Arrow
original.description: The sharper the tip, the better.

display.name: 刻骨箭
display.description: 箭头越尖锐越好。

original.name: Dyed Armor
original.description: It's important for me to be able to work from the safety of the trees.

display.name: 染色护甲
display.description: 我必须躲在安全的树林中才能工作。

original.name: Solid Chestpiece
original.description: I can't fight with arrows sticking out of me!

display.name: 坚实的胸甲
display.description: 我无法在身中百箭的情况下战斗！

original.name: Dusk-Dweller Armor
original.description: Always use your environment to your advantage.

display.name: 黄昏行者护甲
display.description: 要时刻利用周遭的环境。

original.name: Chestpiece of Nature's Wrath
original.description: I am a champion of nature, a hero to some, and ALWAYS paid in advance.

display.name: 自然之怒胸甲
display.description: 我是大自然的勇士，部分人眼中的英雄，以及从不拖欠款项。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位感知大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%
使所有中立阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
